sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113708" key="xeiro/xwlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρό-χωλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113708.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maimed in the hand,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:139" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">139</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
